title: hieracium murorum subsp. ortholepium
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. ortholepium is a subspecies of the Hieracium murorum plant, commonly known as the wall hawkweed, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. ortholepium include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
